name: The Numbered Days
text:
The Numbered Days enters the battlefield with a number of day counters on it equal to the number of doom counters on the Doomsday Clock subtracted from twelve. (Minimum zero. The days are, after all, numbered.)
At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a day counter. You gain 1 life and look at the top card of your library.
When the last day counter is removed, your time is up: each opponent sacrifices a creature and you take an extra turn after this one.
flavorText: A calendar with all the comforting parts removed.
